channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gen Z may be the most indecisive generation regarding career and life choices, but also the most deliberate
item.description: Young people are navigating today's economy with caution and careful planning.

item.title: Global airline industry profits could halve as it faces its worst year since the pandemic
item.description: Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz is adding $100 billion to airlines' collective fuel costs this year.

item.title: The women leading Europe in 2026
item.description: Twenty leaders from Fortune's Most Powerful Women list are based in Europe. Their roles highlight where power is concentrated across the continent.

item.title: AWS warns that AI agents may go off course and aims to fix the problem
item.description: A paper from Amazon Web Services warns that unsupervised agents tend to reason themselves into trouble.
